plugins.name: daily
plugins.description: Personal daily tools: TODO management, Apple Reminders sync, filtered Gmail unread summary, and conversation archiving.

plugins.name: writing
plugins.description: Publication-prep tools for academic / public-facing writing. Two skills: writing-style (13 canonical English-prose rules from agent-style under CC BY 4.0 + 6 page-cap additions, auto-triggers on every writing task) and plot (matplotlib templates for paper figures: bar / box / line / scatter, with a Palatino + Google-brand-tone setup).
